verse_text: And he cried out with a loud voice and said, 'What have I to do with You, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? I implore You by God that You do not torment me.'

links.context: God the most High: Another ancient way of referring to the God of Israel, and one frequently used in localities where non-Jews abound (see [[GEN.14:19]]-22; [[DAN.3:26]]; [[MRK.5:7]]; [[LUK.8:28]]; [[ACT.16:17]]).
